summary: The meeting commenced with administrative procedures, including apologies, late items, and a correction to the February 18 minutes to accurately list Andrew Graham as an attendee. Following administration, Jason Dawson delivered a presentation detailing the performance of the local tourism sector, highlighting strong double-digit growth in Waipā before the COVID-19 pandemic, followed by the severe economic impacts, business hibernations, and job losses resulting from international travel restrictions.

topics.summary: The committee opened the meeting, addressed apologies, confirmed there were no late items or disclosures of interests, and approved the minutes of the February 18 meeting after noting a correction to record Andrew Graham's attendance.

evidence.visual_reference: Cr Susan O'Regan, Cr Andrew Brown, Roger Gordon, Liz Stolwyk

topics.summary: Jason Dawson presented the regional tourism update, detailing Waipā's strong pre-COVID growth followed by immediate downturns due to international border closures, loss of China group travel, and the resulting business hibernations and job losses across hospitality and accommodation.

evidence.visual_reference: COVID-19 - regional tourism imp, Tourism was already impacted - loss of China group travel (Jan 2020), Temporary/seasonal closure - "hibernation"

action_items.task: Correct the February 18 minutes to record Andrew Graham's attendance.
action_items.evidence_quote: So I'm sure we can have that remedied, Sam. Yes, we'll make the changes.
